caption: The video begins with a view of a bathroom, focusing on a wooden door partially open to reveal a small room beyond. The room appears to be a simple, possibly storage or utility space, with a white wall and a small bed or cot covered with a light-colored sheet. A white radiator is mounted on the wall next to the bed. The camera then pans slightly to the right, showing more of the bathroom. The bathroom features a modern design with beige tiles on the walls and a large mirror above a white sink basin. The sink is set into a wooden countertop, and a sleek, metallic faucet is visible. The overall atmosphere suggests a clean and well-maintained living space.
